title: Town Hall Overview: $200,000 Private Sale Complete, Partner TGE March, New Pools, Added LP and More!
html:
A New Phase Begins

As we stand on the cusp of an exciting new phase, the DeHub team is excited to provide a detailed update following our recent Town Hall.

With the decentralized entertainment landscape evolving rapidly — and censorship-resistant, open-source platforms like ours gaining increasing relevance — there has never been a better time to grow this ecosystem.

Token Generation Event (TGE) Timeline Locked In

We are delighted to confirm that the date for the Token Generation Event has now been finalized. External market conditions or short-term sentiment play no role in this decision. Our technical foundation is robust, with the DeHub applications fully developed and ready for scaled deployment. We have successfully onboarded a diverse range of high-profile participants, including prominent streamers, dedicated gaming communities, and UFC-affiliated fighters who are aligned with our vision of on-chain entertainment. This positions DeHub exceptionally well for sustained growth and real-world utility.

Private Sale Conclusion and Fundraising Success

The private sale phase has officially closed. This round was strategically limited to whales, long-term partners, and aligned meme ecosystems that already maintain their own branded assets and communities within the DeHub network. We are proud to report that the private sale has successfully raised $200,000 from the DeHub Whales group and other partners for launch. These funds fully cover the essential requirements for the upcoming TGE, including the establishment of the initial liquidity pool and associated infrastructure. With this milestone achieved, we can now focus entirely on public accessibility and ecosystem expansion.

Public Sale Rounds, Listing Mechanics, and Liquidity Strategy

Public participation opportunities will commence in coordination with (or in close proximity to) the official listing event on the Last Chad Standing (LCS) platform.

Key structural details include:

  • Initiation of a new liquidity pool at a base price of 0.001 $DHB
  • All public sale rounds will accept $DHB as a purchase currency — this design choice eliminates incentives for participants to sell $DHB to acquire $LCS
  • Significant liquidity provision is anticipated at this level, providing strong depth from launch
  • Proceeds raised in ETH, LCS, and SOL during the public rounds will be allocated directly to seed corresponding multi-chain liquidity pools (ETH/LCS/SOL paired with $DHB)

This ensures broad accessibility and robust trading infrastructure across major chains right from the outset.

Strategic Shift: Accelerating Growth Campaigns

Originally, the public rounds and TGE were reserved in anticipation of an extreme bullish cycle — often referred to as the "mother of all alt seasons." However, after careful evaluation of community feedback, game testing results, and the completed state of the DeHub applications, we have determined there is no compelling reason for further delay.

The Last Chad Standing game has received overwhelmingly positive early reviews, confirming its readiness for broader release. Consequently, we are reallocating resources to maximize immediate momentum:

  • Lowering the overall initial raise target compared to prior conservative projections
  • Redirecting capital toward aggressive growth initiatives, including:
  • Expanded onboarding of top-tier streamers and content creators
  • Deep integrations with UFC fighters for exclusive content and promotional campaigns
  • Pre and post TGE marketing efforts focused on long-form storytelling, community events, and visibility across gaming and streaming channels

Our target remains a full public game release by the end of the year — moving beyond successful beta phases into a true game launch. The game features incredibly innovative mechanics never seen before. Not only is it the first pure fighter battle royale, it's the first of its kind to allow spectators and eliminated gamers to predict winners with tokens at stake, or drop supply packages into the game to back their favorite fighters... and this is just the tip of the iceberg.

Looking Ahead: Roadmap Milestones and Momentum

The coming months will be pivotal. We are scheduled to commence the closing phase of our roadmap next week, ramping up promotional campaigns beginning with a high-impact key partner announcement.

Activity will steadily intensify through the remainder of February, culminating in a convergence of major developments in early-to-mid March with all launch partners, launchpads, press releases, and activity to drive ecosystem awareness.

The DeHub community has demonstrated remarkable loyalty and patience throughout this journey. We are now entering the activation phase where that support translates into tangible flywheel effects. With a product that delivers genuine value — compensating elite creators and streamers becomes straightforward and mutually beneficial. Should Last Chad Standing perform as internal testing and early feedback suggest, we anticipate strong organic adoption and global stickiness.

We will maintain consistent communication through February, with regular updates, announcements, and opportunities for engagement. Thank you for being part of this mission to an open source future.

Stay tuned — 2026 is shaping up to be transformative.
